title: Job Opening Category Manager at Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates:
Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates!
